info.name: Boomi Platform REST API
info.description:
The Boomi Platform REST API provides programmatic access to the Boomi Enterprise Platform. It allows control of objects associated with your account including account administration, cloud management, component management, deployment, environment management, execution statistics, integration packs, process execution, and runtime management. The API follows an object/verb hierarchy and uses Basic Authentication with the account ID embedded in the URL path.

Contact Support:
 Name: Boomi Support
